title: Void Ban
description: Bans items in game using commands
body:
Bans items and disable recipes in game using commands Client and server side

NeoForge verison is out BTW

make sure to include " "  before and after anything that needs a modid or uuid in the command or it wont work 

/banitem "modid:itemname" - make sure to include " " in the command or it wont work - Neoforge only

/unbanitem "modid:itemname"  - make sure to include " " in the command or it wont work - Neoforge only

/listbanneditems - shows all banned items

Works with sophisticated backpacks

/banitem modid:itemname - forge only

/unbanitem modid:itemname - forge only

/disablerecipe modid:itemname - forge only

/listdisabledrecipes - forge only

/enablerecipe modid:itemname - forge only
